description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS Builds that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow builds Godot on macOS for x86_64 and arm64 architectures, using a matrix strategy with multiple targets and configurations. It checks out the Godot repository, sets up Python and SCons, installs dependencies, and compiles the project. The workflow also creates universal binaries and app bundles for the editor and template release.
